author: KoreForge
name: KoreForge OData Library
description: OData controller library that references a KoreForge Data project. Generates CRUD controllers via source generator. Add a ProjectReference to your data library after scaffolding.

DatabaseShort.description: Short database name matching the DatabaseShort used in kfdata (e.g. Alerts, Staff). Used in DbContext class name ({DatabaseShort}DbContext).

DataNamespace.description: Root namespace of the data library where the DbContext lives (e.g. KF.Data, MyCompany.Data).
